create.title: Create New Domain
edit.title: Edit Domain
empty.ctaParagraph: Ready to embark on this data adventure? Click the Create Domain button to begin shaping your data landscape!
empty.dataProductsParagraph: <bold>Build Data Products</bold>: Once your domains are set, go a step further! Organize your data assets into data products to realize a data mesh architecture. Data products empower you to treat data as a product, making it more accessible and manageable.
empty.nestedParagraph: <bold> Create Nested Domains:</bold> Want to dive deeper? You can also create nested domains to add granularity and structure. Just like nesting Russian dolls, it's all about refining your organization.
empty.welcomeParagraph: <bold>Welcome to your Data Domains!</bold> It looks like this space is ready to be transformed into a well-organized data universe. Start by creating your first domain - a high-level category for your data assets.
itemMenu.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure you want to remove this {{entityName}}?

list.loadError: Failed to load domains! An unexpected error occurred.
